name: Zinnia Snakefang
sd_appearance: Kobold Zinnia, standing at approximately 2.5 feet tall, has a slender build and a scaled, shaved head intricately adorned with tattoos snaking up her arms. Her outfit is a leather jacket patched with remnants of various magical artifacts, giving her an air of both menace and resourcefulness. She wears chainmail beneath her jacket and carries a warhammer and crossbow at her side. A distinctive visual detail is the warhammer's hilt, adorned with a talon-shaped grip, a reminder of her vengeful pursuit against the Wardens of Ash.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
